mapper.select: select id, client_id as clientId, sign_info as signInfo, sign_state as signState, sign_type as signType, business_web as businessWeb, prove_descr as proveDescr, prove_file as proveFile, created, create_id as createId, updated, update_id as updateId, is_delete as isDelete, extend1, extend2, extend3, extend4 from client_sign where is_delete = 0 order by client_id asc, id asc
